data.title: Notice of Data Breach
data.description: In Vancouver, Washington and Portland, Oregon, on March 27, 2026, Income Property Management Co. announced that they fell victim to a cybercrime. IPM clarified that there is no evidence of any data being misused or attempted to be misused.

data.title: E-Power Inc. and Raytel Electronics Announce Strategic Alliance to Launch Next-Generation 800G and 1.6T High-Speed Optical Modules for U.S. AI Data Centers
data.description: On March 27, 2026, E-Power Inc. revealed a significant strategic collaboration with Raytel Electronics to introduce cutting-edge 800G and 1.6T high-speed optical modules tailored for the North American AI infrastructure sector. E-Power, a prominent provider of AI Data Center microgrid solutions and advanced battery materials trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EPOW, highlighted this partnership as a major move in the industry. This initiative signifies a strong commitment to advancing technology in the region, with a focus on meeting the demands of the growing AI market in North America.

data.title: Draft decisions of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to be held on 24 April 2026
data.description: The Board of Telia Lietuva, AB has put forth a draft agenda and draft decisions for the upcoming Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026. Shareholders will convene to discuss and vote on key matters concerning the Company's operations. This pivotal meeting will address important proposals aimed at shaping the future of Telia Lietuva. Save the date to have a say in the Company's direction on the specified day.

data.title: Transform 2026 Concludes with 4,000+ Leaders Defining the Human + AI Equation
data.description: Over the course of three days, Transform highlighted main stage insights, provided hands-on learning opportunities, and revealed major announcements, establishing itself as the leading community event for leaders focused on people-oriented initiatives. This event took place in Las Vegas from March 27, 2026, and boasted significant participation numbers.

data.title: Notice of the Annual General Meeting of shareholders on 24 April 2026
data.description: The shareholders of Telia Lietuva, AB (company code: 121215434, registered at Saltoniškių str. 7 A, Vilnius, Lithuania) are invited to attend the Annual General Meeting scheduled to take place at the company's headquarters on Saltoniškių str. 7A, Vilnius, Lithuania, at 13:00 on April 24, 2026. Registration will be open from 12:00 to 12:30 for shareholders wishing to participate.

data.title: The Board approved financial statements for the year 2025 and proposes to pay EUR 0.14 dividend per share for the year 2025
data.description: On March 26, 2026, the Board of Directors of Telia Lietuva, AB made a decision.

data.title: Atlanta Braves, Gray Media to Simulcast 25 Regular Season Games on Free, Local Over-the-Air Television Stations Across the Southeast
data.description: In a recent announcement, the Atlanta Braves and Atlanta-based Gray Media have revealed a multi-year deal to broadcast 25 regular season Braves games on Gray television stations across Braves Country in partnership with BravesVision. Raycom Sports, a part of Gray Media, has been chosen by the Braves to produce the complete season of non-national games for BravesVision. Under this agreement, Raycom Sports will be responsible for providing live production services for BravesVision. The inaugural BravesVision simulcast on Gray stations is scheduled for Friday, March 27 (Opening Day), featuring the game between the Atlanta Braves and the Kansas City Royals at 7:15 p.m. ET.

data.title: The Oil Shock Hit. The Treasury Shock Is Coming, This Chart Warns
data.description: There is a significant mispricing in the bond market currently being overlooked by most, as the price of WTI crude oil surged to $99 on Friday, marking its highest level since July 2022. The 2-Year Treasury yield, a key indicator of Federal Reserve interest rates, stands at 3.92%, notably lower than the over 5% rate seen the last time oil prices were at this level. This highlights a 100-basis-point disparity from historical trends. Technical analyst John Roque from 22V Research has raised concerns about this discrepancy, identifying the 2-Year yield as a more critical threat than the attention-grabbing oil prices. He predicts a near-term target of 5% for the 2-Year yield. For more details, refer to the full coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: object studio’s Bella Loyalty Platform Integrates with Playersoft ONE for Expanded Casino Guest Data Connectivity
data.description: A company based in Austin, Texas, called object studio has announced that its Bella Loyalty Platform is now integrated with Playersoft ONE, a move that will enhance connectivity for casino guest data. This collaboration is aimed at providing casinos with better insights into customer behavior and preferences. The integration of Bella Loyalty Platform with Playersoft ONE will allow for a more seamless flow of information, leading to improved services and experiences for guests. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing data connectivity in the casino industry, potentially benefiting a wide range of businesses.

data.title: Greenland Energy Company (NASDAQ: GLND) Secures a Strategic Agreement for Advanced Rig Capacity to Support the Onshore Oil Exploration Program in Greenland
data.description: Greenland Energy has partnered with Stampede Drilling (TSX: SDI) in a strategic agreement to employ a cutting-edge drilling rig in the challenging Arctic conditions of the Jameson Land Basin. Stampede Drilling has been chosen to conduct Greenland Energy's upcoming 2026 drilling campaign. This collaboration aims to enhance operational efficiency in the region. The agreement was finalized on March 27, 2026, with headquarters in Houston and Calgary.

data.title: Wilentz, Goldman & Spitzer, P.A. Welcomes Roberto J. Benites to the Firm
data.description: In Woodbridge, N.J., on March 27, 2026, Wilentz, Goldman & Spitzer, P.A. welcomed Roberto J. Benites as Counsel in its Workers' Compensation Team at the Woodbridge office. Benites rejoins Wilentz, where he initially started his legal career.

data.title: xTool Rides Into Custom Motorcycle Culture as Title Sponsor of The Handbuilt Show
data.description: In the bustling city of Austin, Texas, on March 27, 2026, xTool, a prestigious worldwide consumer-tech brand, known for enabling the transition from digital to physical creations, is stepping into the limelight. The brand is taking center stage as the headline sponsor of The Handbuilt Show, Presented by xTool. This event is currently in progress in the motorcycle and custom fabrication hub.

data.title: BayCare Named a Tampa Bay Times Top Workplace for the 12th Straight Year
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida, on March 27, 2026, BayCare was announced as a recipient of the 2026 Tampa Bay Times Top Workplace award for the 12th year in a row. This accolade, determined solely through feedback from team members, highlights BayCare's dedication to cultivating a positive work environment.
